script:
#!/bin/bash
set +e
echo '=== 1. p0 .env ==='
grep -i 'POSTGRES\|DB_\|DATABASE' /opt/p0-foundation/.env 2>/dev/null || echo 'No PG vars in p0 .env'
echo '=== 2. docker-compose ==='
grep -i 'POSTGRES\|password' /opt/p0-foundation/docker-compose.yml 2>/dev/null || echo 'No PG in docker-compose'
echo '=== 3. Docker container env ==='
docker exec n8n-postgres-1 env 2>/dev/null | grep -i 'POSTGRES' || echo 'Cannot read container env'
echo '=== 4. Docker inspect env ==='
docker inspect n8n-postgres-1 --format '{{range .Config.Env}}{{println .}}{{end}}' 2>/dev/null | grep -i POSTGRES || echo 'Cannot inspect'
echo '=== 5. Try psql with no password ==='
docker exec n8n-postgres-1 psql -U n8n -d vector_memory -c 'SELECT 1 as test;' 2>&1
echo '=== 6. Check pg_hba.conf ==='
docker exec n8n-postgres-1 cat /var/lib/postgresql/data/pg_hba.conf 2>/dev/null | tail -5 || echo 'Cannot read pg_hba'
echo '=== 7. Current claude.env ==='
cat /opt/claude-code/env/claude.env
echo 'DONE'
